# Copilot instructions — Estimation Studio

Read `AGENT.md` and `docs/ES_MEMORY.md` before coding.

Memory: auto-update at session end — `docs/ES_MEMORY.md`, `docs/SESSION_LOG.md`, `docs/LIVE_STATE.md`.

ES mirrors **legacy Laravel** costing — not PEBI MES. Engine reference: `archive/legacy-laravel/COSTING_NOTES.md`.

Build spec: `docs/ES_PRD_v3_FINAL_BUILD_SPEC.md`. Locked decisions: `docs/LOCKED_DECISIONS.md`.

Repo: `https://github.com/camsalloum/propackhub-es.git`
